# OASIS Support Ticket Template

Use this template for customer-facing support issues and internal escalations.

## Ticket Metadata

- Ticket ID:
- Created at:
- Created by:
- Severity: P1 / P2 / P3 / P4
- Current status: new / investigating / waiting on customer / waiting on provider / mitigated / closed
- Assigned owner:
- Escalation owner:
- Customer update due:

## Customer And Account Context

- Customer/account name:
- `account_id`:
- Reporter email:
- Affected user email:
- Affected `user_id`:
- Active role:
- Browser/device:
- Locale/language:

## Issue Summary

- Affected route/feature:
- User action attempted:
- Expected behavior:
- Actual behavior:
- First seen timestamp and timezone:
- Is the issue reproducible:
- Business impact:

## Evidence

- Screenshots or recording:
- Console/network error:
- Correlation id:
- Provider id:
- Invite id/token id:
- Document id:
- Payment id:
- Maintenance request id:
- Work order id:
- Related release id:

Do not include secrets, raw API keys, passwords, full reset tokens, or full invite verification links.

## Triage

- Initial classification:
- Matching runbook:
- Read-only checks completed:
- Provider logs checked:
- Security/denied events checked:
- Account/role checked:
- Reproduction steps:

## Remediation

- Remediation applied:
- Rows touched, if any:
- Provider action taken:
- Code/config change required:
- Rollback required:
- Customer workaround:

## Customer Updates

- Initial response sent:
- Latest customer update:
- Next update due:
- Customer-facing explanation:

## Closure

- Root cause:
- Verification completed:
- Customer confirmed:
- Follow-up issue:
- Closed by:
- Closed at:
